arts.ttl: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario issues lengthy social media message to 'clarify' his actions - after gesture after AZ Alkmaar loss backfired
arts.sum: Vicario turned and stormed off when his attempts to gee up those in the away end following the defeat in the first leg of the last-16 tie with AZ backfired and instead unleashed a barrage of abuse.
